# MERN Project Setup Instructions

## Project Overview
This is a MERN stack project with MongoDB, Express, React, and Node.js.
- **Server**: Node.js + Express backend API
- **Client**: React frontend application
- **Database**: MongoDB

## Setup Progress
- [x] Verify copilot-instructions.md
- [x] Clarify Project Requirements (MERN stack)
- [x] Scaffold the Project
- [x] Customize the Project
- [x] Install Required Extensions
- [x] Compile the Project
- [x] Create and Run Task
- [x] Launch the Project
- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete

## Project Status
✅ **Server Running**: http://localhost:5000
✅ **Client Running**: http://localhost:3000
✅ **Database**: MongoDB connected

## Development Commands
- Install dependencies: `npm install` (in both root and client)
- Start development: `npm run dev` (from root)
- Build client: `npm run build` (from client)
